name: Barbell Good Morning
setup: Bar on upper back (same position as low-bar squat)
execution: Hinge at hips, pushing butt back
Lower torso until parallel to floor or hamstring stretch feels max
Reverse by driving hips forward, squeezing glutes at top
common_mistakes: Too much knee bend (turning into squat)
Going too deep without hamstring flexibility
cues: Push hips back as if closing a car door with your butt
Feel the stretch in hamstrings, not lower back
